title: iOS Shortcut for voice capture
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want 'Hey Siri, capture brain' to record a thought from anywhere so that capture latency is near zero.
acceptanceCriteria: Step 2: HTTP POST to https://app.{domain}/api/capture with { text: <dictation>, source: 'ios-voice' } and the bearer header
Added to iCloud Shortcuts so it is available on iPhone + Apple Watch
Verify: 'Hey Siri, capture brain. <some short dictated thought with a unique marker>' -> episode visible in Graphiti within minutes
